amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 25 — paragraph 1 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 25 — paragraph 1 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

1 a. The authorised representative shall reside or be established in one of the Member States where the activities pursuant to Article 2, paragraphs 1(cb) are taking place.
parliament_text: 1 a. The authorised representative shall reside or be established in one of the Member States where the activities pursuant to Article 2, paragraphs 1(cb) are taking place.
